description: §18.0.2 — an exhaustive block-`<match>` whose arms carry NO `effect=` attribute SHALL NOT fire E-MATCH-EFFECT-FORBIDDEN (nor E-MATCH-ONTRANSITION-FORBIDDEN). Acceptance sibling of e-match-effect-forbidden-pos: the read-only match compiles clean when its arms declare only display bodies.
rationale: §18.0.2: match-block arm attribute legality — a match arm with only a display body (no `effect=`) is legal; the forbidden-effect check is correctly silent.
